hooks.command: echo 'Verwende stattdessen die vectordb-search MCP Tools (search_code, search_files, search_symbols)' >&2; exit 2
input=$(cat); if echo "$input" | grep -qi '"subagent_type".*"Explore"'; then echo 'Verwende vectordb-search MCP Tools statt Agent Explore für Codebase-Suchen' >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0
input=$(cat); if echo "$input" | grep -qE '"command".*\b(grep|rg)\b'; then echo 'Verwende vectordb-search MCP Tools statt grep/rg im Terminal' >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0
